message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-discovery-enums): pin HealthFilter + ConnectorArchetype + LatencyHint + HostHealthStatus + MeshStatus + PolicyEngineStatus wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-8vm8e)

19 tests pinning the six discovery-surface status / classification
enums every external consumer of the host's /health, /discover,
and /introspect endpoints depends on. Drift in any one silently
breaks Grafana panels, agent filtering, archetype-based routing.

- HealthFilter 4 lowercase variants (healthy/degraded/available/all)
- ConnectorArchetype 6 snake_case variants (unknown/request_response/
  streaming/bidirectional/polling/webhook)
- LatencyHint 4 snake_case variants (fast/medium/slow/very_slow)
- HostHealthStatus 3 lowercase variants (healthy/degraded/unhealthy)
- MeshStatus 4 snake_case variants (connected/degraded/unreachable/
  not_configured) + is_operational ⇔ {Connected, Degraded}
- PolicyEngineStatus 4 snake_case variants (active/partially_loaded/
  not_initialized/error) + can_decide ⇔ {Active, PartiallyLoaded}
- Each enum rejects mixed-case / camelCase / unknown / empty
- Copy traits for HealthFilter and ConnectorArchetype (pass-by-value
  hot paths)
- Cross-enum distinct-variants sanity for HealthFilter,
  ConnectorArchetype, MeshStatus

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
